name: lyndrix-app
description: Lyndrix Android app — Capacitor native shell that remote-loads the Lyndrix UI from a runtime-configurable origin.

scripts.build:prod: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleProdRelease
scripts.build:dev: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDevRelease
scripts.build: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleProdRelease assembleDevRelease
